zh.lifeSummary: Martha Washburn是Timothy Washburn和Hannah的女兒，於大約1729年出生。她於1752年6月4日與Jabez Wright在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Martha Washburn是Timothy Washburn和Hannah的女儿，于大约1729年出生。她于1752年6月4日与Jabez Wright在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Washburn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucestershire), or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The Gloucestershire placename derives from Old English wæsse (genitive wæssan) ‘wet place, swamp, marsh’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. The Devon placename derives from Old English wæsce ‘place for washing’ + burna.
History: John Washburn came to MA in 1626 and settled in Duxbury, MA, in 1632.

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

en.lifeSummary: Martha Washburn was born about 1729 as the daughter of Timothy Washburn and Hannah. She married Jabez Wright on 4 June 1752, in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters.

ru.lifeSummary: Martha Washburn родилась около 1729 г. Её родителей звали Timothy Washburn и Hannah. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jabez Wright 4 июня 1752 г. в местности лебанон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Martha Washburn nació aproximadamente 1729 como hija de Timothy Washburn y Hannah. Se casó con Jabez Wright el 4 de junio de 1752, en Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas.
